title: Red Zinger Mini Classic 1989 boys 13 stage 1 East Boulder

transcript.text: Well, good morning. Here we are. It's 12 o'clock, and we are at the beginning of the Red Zinger Mini Classic, an 8th stage race.
This morning it is in Boulder, and it's called the Flat Arms Parkway Race. This is a criterium.
It will be running 10 laps. This goes by team, so you will see the team that Michael is on.
The season is in a peach-colored jersey, and it's a beautiful day. We've got wonderful sunshine, blue sky, and a little bit of wind that would die down a little tiny bit.
Today is the winner of last weekend's race with Sandal, and this is what the beginning of the start line looks like.
I'm going to leave you now. Okay, here we are, lining up.
Rider 140, also 40, from Orlando, Florida, Brian Silver, leading our field of 13-year-old boys.
In the second row, was lined up according to accumulative points from the first two races.
Rider 146, Jamal White.
So even though he came in first in the first race, he was penalized because he didn't go to the Vail, which was the second race, so he's in the second row.
But he's in a good position, so he'll do fine.
We'll be pulling left riders.
Here he goes. You'll hear the gunshot.
And they're off.
And they're off to the end of 1989 Red Slinger Mini Classic.
